evidence.title: Is tax applicable for Hackathon prize | TaxTMI
evidence.snippet: I’m a college student in India who, with a teammate, won $10,000 (~?8,30,000)a   (Berlin). The prize is sent to my Indian bank account from Germany, split equally (?4,15,000 each). Is this   under   (30% + cess) as a "game," or as normal income under slab rates (new regime, potentially ?0  )? No TDS was deducted (foreign payer). How do we report this in ITR, ensure FEMA compliance, and minimize  ?
